name: Irene's Hot Borscht
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the beets and add them to a large pot with water. Bring to a boil and cook until done, about 45 minutes. Add salt. Remove the beets from the water and set aside to cool.
2. Peel the potatoes and cut into 1/8s. Add to the beet water. Cook until almost done.
3. Chop the onion and bell pepper (add Jalapenos for extra spice if desired). Grate the carrots and finely chop the garlic.
4. Sauté the vegetables in oil until tender. Add tomato paste and enough water to make a thick sauce. Cook for an additional five minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Coarsely grate the cooled beets.
6. Coarsely chop 1/4 of a head of cabbage and add to the potatoes and beet water. Boil until the cabbage is tender, about 15 minutes.
7. Add the vegetables and vinegar to the sauce. Taste and adjust seasoning with salt as needed.
8. Serve in soup bowls topped with a dollop of sour cream.
